scripts.install:all: npm --prefix auth-service install && npm --prefix product-service install && npm --prefix order-service install && npm --prefix inventory-service install && npm --prefix statistics-service install && npm --prefix api-gateway install
scripts.start: concurrently -n gateway,auth,product,order,inventory,statistics -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,white "npm --prefix api-gateway start" "npm --prefix auth-service start" "npm --prefix product-service start" "npm --prefix order-service start" "npm --prefix inventory-service start" "npm --prefix statistics-service start"
scripts.test: npm --prefix auth-service test && npm --prefix product-service test && npm --prefix order-service test && npm --prefix inventory-service test && npm --prefix statistics-service test && npm --prefix api-gateway test
